# The Local Jewel

> The Local Jewel is an independent custom jewelry studio specializing in lab-grown diamond engagement rings, wedding bands, and fine jewelry. Every piece is hand-crafted to order in Winter Park, Florida — no middlemen, no chain-store markups. Free design quote in 90 seconds, ships in 2–5 business days, lifetime warranty.

Founded by Ansh and Nayan, The Local Jewel has delivered hundreds of custom pieces nationwide with a 4.9★ average rating. We design, render, and hand-set every ring ourselves — and every diamond is IGI or GIA certified.

## Shop

- [Engagement Rings](https://www.thelocaljewel.com/collections/engagement-rings): Lab-grown diamond engagement rings in 14K/18K gold and platinum, 0.5–5+ carats
- [Wedding Bands](https://www.thelocaljewel.com/collections/wedding-bands): Plain and pavé wedding bands in matching metals
- [Tennis Bracelets](https://www.thelocaljewel.com/collections/tennis-bracelets): Lab-grown diamond tennis bracelets
- [Pendants & Studs](https://www.thelocaljewel.com/collections/pendants-studs): Solitaire pendants and stud earrings
- [All collections](https://www.thelocaljewel.com/collections)

## Design custom

- [Start a custom quote](https://www.thelocaljewel.com/): 90-second wizard — free, no payment required

## Trust signals

- Hand-crafted in Winter Park, Florida (USA)
- IGI / GIA certified diamonds
- Lifetime warranty + free cleaning & inspection
- 30-day exchanges, free fully-insured shipping
- 4.9★ average rating across 70+ verified customer reviews
